zh-CN.title: How use Final Cut Pro X
zh-CN.content: 最近从西藏回来了，路上拍了一些视频，特此想制作视频，很早之前自己学习了Final Cut Pro， 但是现在有给忘记了😂，今天这里就感觉再次记录下重新拿起Final Cut 的一些过程和经历。

en.title: How use Final Cut Pro X
en.content: I recently returned from Tibet and filmed some videos along the way. I wanted to make a video about it. I learned Final Cut Pro a long time ago, but I've forgotten most of it now 😂. Today, I'd like to record some of the process and experiences of picking up Final Cut again.
